mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_AUTHS ( USER_ID , AUTH_NM ) VALUES ( #{userId} , #{authNm} )
mapper.select: SELECT TU.USER_ID AS USER_ID , TU.USER_PW AS USER_PW , TU.USER_NM AS USER_NM , TU.STATUS AS STATUS , TU.LOGIN_DT AS LOGIN_DT , TU.REG_DT AS REG_DT , TA.AUTH_NM AS AUTH_NM FROM TB_USER TU JOIN TB_AUTHS TA ON TU.USER_ID = TA.USER_ID WHERE TU.USER_ID = #{userId}
